title: pelargonium sessiliflorum
intro: Pelargonium sessiliflorum, also known as the "Kaffir tea plant" or "red-leaved pelargonium", is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The leaves and flowers of the plant are known to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, promoting digestion, and aiding in respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium sessiliflorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
